g.text: To compute output n=0, must read
For FP32: row_offset = n * K * 4 bytes

svg.text: Example: Linear layer 896 → 4864 (w1 in MLP, Q5_0 quantized)

g.text: // Calculate row offset for output neuron n
* K-quants require K aligned to 256; 896 = 3.5 super-blocks (padded)
